understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece so that all goal tiles marked with a `+` are occupied at the same time, within the limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A single piece is active/selected at a time; actions are used to try to move that selected piece to a chosen location. Clicking attempts to move the selected piece to the clicked coordinate (often successfully when the destination/path is valid, otherwise the piece stays put and the step is still consumed). Movement is constrained by walls/obstacles, so blocked targets or unreachable locations result in no movement; selecting/switching pieces is done via clicks on their positions when multiple pieces exist, and all goals must be covered simultaneously for a win.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece so that all goal tiles marked with a `+` are occupied at the same time, within the limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A single piece is active/selected at a time; actions are used to try to move that selected piece to a chosen location. Clicking attempts to move the selected piece to the clicked coordinate (often successfully when the destination/path is valid, otherwise the piece stays put and the step is still consumed). Movement is constrained by walls/obstacles, so blocked targets or unreachable locations result in no movement; selecting/switching pieces is done via clicks on their positions when multiple pieces exist, and all goals must be covered simultaneously for a win.
